name: PIMCO
notes: Largest fixed income manager, extensive public research

name: Blackstone
notes: Largest alternative asset manager, has insights page

name: Goldman Sachs Asset Management
notes: Publishes quarterly Market Know-How and economic outlooks; freely accessible public research

name: Cambridge Associates
notes: Investment consulting firm; public insights on PE, VC, endowments, macro; HIGH quality, April 2026 active

name: Wellington Management
notes: Freely accessible research on equity, macro, private credit, alternatives, ESG; fills multi-asset equity gap

name: Amundi Research Center
notes: Europe's largest asset manager; free public research center with macro, ESG, cross-asset, EM; weekly updates

name: J.P. Morgan Asset Management
notes: Weekly market commentary (On the Minds of Investors, Weekly Recap); freely accessible; multi-asset macro/equity/fixed income

name: T. Rowe Price
notes: Active equity/fixed income manager; public insights hub covering equity, markets, multi-asset, AI; fills active equity gap

name: Fidelity Investments
notes: Major US asset manager $4T+ AUM; public market insights at fidelity.com/viewpoints covering equity, fixed income, macro, alternatives; institutional research also available

name: BlackRock Investment Institute
notes: World's largest asset manager; free macro, factor, and portfolio research; weekly/monthly updates; covers geopolitics, sustainability, and asset allocation

name: Research Affiliates
notes: Rob Arnott's firm; pioneered smart beta/RAFI; free high-quality papers on valuation, factor investing, expected returns, and asset allocation

name: Schroders
notes: Major UK asset manager; free insights covering global macro, EM, sustainability/ESG, private assets; fills international and ESG gap

name: The Carlyle Group
notes: Global PE/credit/real assets manager; public insights on alternatives, private credit, macro outlook

name: MSCI Research
notes: Global index and analytics provider; free research on factor investing, ESG, risk, and portfolio construction; highly cited in institutional space

name: Neuberger Berman
notes: Multi-asset manager, public insights page covers macro, fixed income, alternatives, hedge fund perspectives

name: PGIM
notes: Prudential's institutional asset manager; free public research on fixed income, private credit, alternatives, ESG; fills credit/alternatives gap
